envVars.name: SMTP_HOST
envVars.setup: Set the SMTP host for alert email delivery.

envVars.name: SMTP_PORT
envVars.setup: Set the SMTP port for alert email delivery.

envVars.name: SMTP_USER
envVars.setup: Set the SMTP username for alert email delivery.

envVars.name: SMTP_PASSWORD
envVars.setup: Set the SMTP password or token for alert email delivery.

envVars.name: ALERT_EMAIL_FROM
envVars.setup: Set the From address used for alert email notifications.

browsers.name: chromium
browsers.install: pnpm --dir code exec playwright install chromium

runtime.infrastructure: pnpm --dir code exec docker compose up -d --wait
runtime.teardown: pnpm --dir code exec docker compose down -v

verticalSlice.description: Start the stack, authenticate, and verify health monitoring and deployment surfaces are reachable.
